en: A group of actors is called a cast A group
of athletes is called a team A group of
friends is called a circle A group of dancers is
called a troop A group of sailors is called
a crew And a group of singers is called a choir
ko: 모임을 crew라고 해. 가수들의 모임을 choir라고 해.

en: Difficult pronunciation choir choir Do you want to improve your vocabulary
ko: 발음이 어려워. choir, choir. 어휘력을 향상시키고 싶어?

en: Download my free ebook The link is in the pinned comment
ko: 무료 전자책을 다운로드해. 링크는 고정 댓글에 있어.
